历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 369 → 279 → 271 → 256 → 256, showing a continuous upward trend (decreasing ranking numbers), with a cumulative advance of about 113 places over the past 4 years, and a baseline ranking of approximately 256 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for science groups in Shanxi Province: 14 in 2021, 67 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 17 in 2024, and 27 in 2025 (physics category). In 2026, the physics category plan is 21, a reduction of about 22% compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university, member of the C9 League. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has consistently ranked 4th, belonging to the top tier of national universities. The reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, mainly involving academic misconduct (retraction incidents, etc.) and campus safety incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on application enthusiasm. Douyin popularity ranking is 42nd (relatively popular), with overall exposure at a medium-to-high level. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, it has over 20 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanical Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A+, Biology A+, Business Administration A+, Management Science and Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, etc., with extremely strong disciplinary strength, attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular in society. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, slightly easing competition pressure. The main campus of Shanghai Jiao Tong University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, with strong regional appeal. The university's enrollment proportion in Shanxi Province is about 2.5%–4.7% (2021–2025), and it is not a local university, so there is no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-22%) intensifying competition, the strong attraction of the top-tier university for high-scoring candidates, and the limited inhibitory effect from the slight decrease in total candidates and the somewhat negative reputation, the ranking is expected to continue advancing from the 2025 baseline of 256. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 252, with a range of 223–281.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 252, range 223–281. Candidates with rankings within the lower limit of the range (223) can focus on Tier 1 flagship majors (Yongqiang Pilot Class in Computer Science, AI Top Class, etc.). Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (around 252) are advised to mainly target Tier 2 with some Tier 1 attempts. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (281) are advised to mainly use Tier 3 as a safety net. Shanghai Jiao Tong University's top disciplines are concentrated in engineering fields such as Electronic Information, Computer Science, and Mechanical Engineering. When applying, it is recommended to prioritize majors strongly related to the university's A+ disciplines.
